calendar.description: House Business, Labor, and Commerce Hearing

general_provisions: This bill amends provisions related to parent access to a minor's medical record.
hilighted_provisions: This bill:<hr><ltbullet>defines terms;<hr><ltbullet>specifies that a parent has the right to access their child's medical record;<hr><ltbullet>requires a health care facility to ensure that a child's parent has access to the child's electronic health record unless certain circumstances are met;<hr><ltbullet>requires an electronic medical record system vendor to ensure a health care facility can provide access to parents;<hr><ltbullet>authorizes the attorney general's office to bring enforcement actions; and<hr><ltbullet>requires a health care facility to provide medical records free of charge under certain circumstances.
